---
title: "anurag builds things"
title-block-banner: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
        .anchorjs-link { display: none !important; }
        .quarto-listing .list .quarto-post:nth-child(odd),
        .quarto-listing .list .quarto-post:nth-child(even) {
          background: transparent !important;
        }
      </style>
listing:
  id: log
  contents: posts
  type: default
  image-align: right
  image-height: "158px"
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
  feed: true
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
page-layout: custom
toc: false
---

```{=html}

<!-- ── Hero standfirst ────────────────────────────────────── -->
<h1 class="hero-standfirst">
  anurag builds <span class="rotator accent" aria-live="polite" aria-label="rotating phrase">
    <span class="ghost" aria-hidden="true">intelligent systems</span>
    <span class="stage" aria-hidden="true"><span class="typed"></span><span class="cursor"></span></span>
  </span>
</h1>

<script>
  (function () {
    var WORDS = ['things', 'RAG', 'intelligent systems', 'systems', 'world models'];
    var TYPE_MS = 75, BACK_MS = 42, HOLD_MS = 2500, EMPTY_MS = 380;

    var typed = document.querySelector('.hero-standfirst .rotator .typed');
    if (!typed) return;

    if (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) {
      typed.textContent = WORDS[0];
      return;
    }

    var idx = 0;
    function later(fn, ms) { setTimeout(fn, ms); }
    function typeIn(word, done) {
      var i = 0;
      (function step() {
        typed.textContent = word.slice(0, i);
        if (i < word.length) { i++; later(step, TYPE_MS); }
        else later(done, HOLD_MS);
      })();
    }
    function backspace(done) {
      var cur = typed.textContent, i = cur.length;
      (function step() {
        typed.textContent = cur.slice(0, i);
        if (i > 0) { i--; later(step, BACK_MS); }
        else later(done, EMPTY_MS);
      })();
    }
    (function loop() {
      typeIn(WORDS[idx], function () {
        backspace(function () { idx = (idx + 1) % WORDS.length; loop(); });
      });
    })();
  })();
</script>

<p class="hero-dek">
  I build things to understand how they actually work.
  A question, a system built to answer it, a comparison against real data.
  Just the code, the curves, and what they actually mean.
</p>

```

::: {#log}
:::
